failures.description: Dataset contained 20 Ukraine-related posts mixed into #MahsaAmini data
failures.cause: Original data collection had overlapping time period with Ukraine crisis
failures.resolution: Added mandatory visual inspection step to data preparation phase
failures.lesson: Always read 10-20 random posts from sample before coding. Metadata inspection is not enough.

failures.description: Kimi K2.5 truncates JSON output when batch size exceeds 30 posts
failures.cause: Model output token limit or JSON serialization issue
failures.detection_method: Missing posts in output count check
failures.lesson: Always use 25-post batches for Kimi K2.5. Verify output count matches input count.

failures.description: Used OLS regression on highly skewed engagement data
failures.cause: Did not run distribution diagnostics before model selection
failures.detection_method: Adversarial peer review flagged residual non-normality
failures.resolution: Added mandatory distribution diagnostics phase; decision tree for model selection
failures.lesson: Never run OLS on engagement/count data without justification. Default to Negative Binomial for social media metrics.

failures.description: Reported only aggregate κ, hiding low reliability on specific frames
failures.cause: Protocol did not require frame-specific breakdown
failures.detection_method: Cross-model review noticed SOLIDARITY frame had only 28% three-way agreement
failures.lesson: Always report reliability BY FRAME. Aggregate κ can hide frame-specific problems.

failures.description: Chinese LLM content filters blocked analysis of Xinjiang-related content via direct API
failures.cause: API-level content filtering on sensitive topics
failures.resolution: Document which API endpoints have content filters; use proxy services for sensitive research when necessary
failures.lesson: Chinese LLM content filtering is at API layer, not model weights. Academic framing does not bypass filters.

alerts.message: Kimi K2.5 truncates JSON on batches >30 posts
Chinese LLMs may refuse Xinjiang/Uyghur content via direct API
alerts.mitigation: Use multi-model approach with non-Chinese models as backup
